text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while relaxing at the park...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Nothing like some good R and R to heal the soul.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you look like you're going to slip off into
dreamland with that teacup still in hand, Sei.
choice_data_list: What are you both up to?
What are you both up to?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, Trainer. We're just having an outdoor tea
ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to join us? You needn't worry
about following etiquette—just enjoy yourself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We've prepared more than enough treats as well,
hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing like kicking back in nature.
Outdoor tea parties are the best.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. ♪ Now then, shall we begin the
ceremony?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I'm not really into sitting on my knees for
the whole time...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All I fancy's a nice nap in the warm sunlight.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hang on now. I do want some of those sweets,
though... They have just the right balance of
sweetness—I could eat the whole plate. ♪
choice_data_list: It's hard to stop once you start, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right. Sheesh. Hey, as long as I burn
the calories later, there's no harm.
choice_data_list: That means you can't skip practice.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're quite right. It's crucial to strike a balance
between how much we eat and how we exercise.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So, let's do some running together after this,
Sei. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second now, is that why you invited my
trainer to join us?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... What makes you ask that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's underhanded show of concern
pays off, and Seiun Sky ends up exercising to
account for the extra calories.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You get it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Scrumptious sweets with the simple yet refined
taste of tea make for an unbeatable pair.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We have more than enough to go around, so eat
and drink to your heart's content.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! I'm in heaven here! I'm gonna try a
little of everything. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky and I stuff ourselves with delicious
snacks.
